ddls:
CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "source_script_guids" TEXT /* Source script GUIDs associated with the unit */,
  "option_type" TEXT /* Type of unit option (e.g., Unity.VisualScripting.UnitOption`1) */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of unit (e.g., Unity.VisualScripting.CountItems) */,
  "label_human" TEXT /* Human-readable label for the unit */,
  "label_programmer" TEXT /* Programmer-readable label for the unit */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the unit (e.g., Collections/Dictionaries) */,
  "favorite_key" TEXT /* Favorite key for the unit */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the unit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the unit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the unit */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the unit is active */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the unit */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the unit's test (e.g., not tested, passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_unit_type FOREIGN KEY ("unit_type") REFERENCES unit_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit type */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the unit type is deprecated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the unit type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the unit type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID to support hierarchical categories */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit property */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit property */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the unit property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Data type of the property value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the property was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_properties_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit relationship */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit */,
  "related_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related unit */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., input, output) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_relationships_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_relationships_related_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_inputs" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit input */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit the input belongs to */,
  "input_type" TEXT /* Type of input (e.g., System.Collections.IEnumerable) */,
  "input_name" TEXT /* Name of the input */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the input is required */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the input */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the input was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the input */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_inputs_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit output */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit the output belongs to */,
  "output_type" TEXT /* Type of output (e.g., System.Int32) */,
  "output_name" TEXT /* Name of the output */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the output is required */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the output */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the output was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the output */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_outputs_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user roles table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., developer, designer, administrator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., create_unit, edit_unit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user roles table */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user permissions table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the units table */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "test_log" TEXT /* Log details of the test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the test was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_tests_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)
